_meta.note: CA federal House CA-11 Pelosi-seat batch: nancy-pelosi (lame_duck D incumbent, retired announced 2025-11-06, evidence-scored from 38-year voting record + Heritage 0% + Wikipedia political-positions cite trail), saikat-chakrabarti (ex-AOC chief of staff JD founder, LOST primary 3rd ~15%, WITHDREW 2026-06-03; HARD AIPAC-refusal pledge w/ dedicated ActBlue URL + total Israel arms embargo + Hindu = heterodox-D catches), marie-hurabiell (Trump-appointed Presidio Trust ex-R running as D, LOST primary 4th 4.5%; HARD anti-trans-women-in-sports X posts + HARD anti-CRT Hitler/KKK comparison + pro-Israel-hawk Libitzky/WINEP donor courting = heterodox-ex-R catches), jingchao-xiong (LOST primary 10th of 11 ~2.3%; data-fix CRITICAL: he is REPUBLICAN not D as record had; sparse first-time candidate, roster_verified), david-ganezer (Santa Monica Observer publisher, LOST primary; self-confessed 'social moderate who supports gay marriage and abortion rights' = HARD pro-choice + pro-SSM Republican catch; $60 total raise, perennial). Net: 4-of-5 LOST primary + 1 lame-duck retirement + 1 party-data fix. CA-11 Pelosi-seat sweep now 7-of-X withdrawn/lost across multi-batch refinement series.

set.office: US Representative CA-11 (Speaker Emerita · retiring 2027 · seat open 2026)

profile.religion: Catholic (publicly identifies; 2008 Brokaw 'Meet the Press' abortion-conception remarks were rebuked by Archbishop Wuerl; met Pope Benedict XVI 2009 re: abortion).
profile.background: US Representative CA-11 (CA-5 + CA-8 + CA-12 across redistricting) since 1987. 52nd Speaker of the House (2007-2011, 2019-2023). Now Speaker Emerita. Announced retirement Nov 6 2025; serving out term through Jan 2027. Born Nancy D'Alesandro 1940-03-26, Baltimore MD.

nancy-pelosi.notes_set: US Rep CA-11, Speaker Emerita (D, since 1987); retired/lame-duck Nov 6 2025, serving through Jan 2027. [2026-06 national-autopilot refinement, federal tier] Floor-of-rubric scoring: voted NAY on every conservative-position bill in scope. HARD-evidence cells: HR 8404 Respect for Marriage Act YEA (h513, Dec 8 2022); HR 22 SAVE Act NAY (h102, Apr 10 2025); HR 1 For the People Act architect (117th); HR 5/HR 15 Equality Act cosponsor across multiple Congresses; PBABA 2003 NAY; ACA contraceptive mandate architect (Hobby Lobby/Little Sisters litigation downstream); 1994 Assault Weapons Ban co-leader + HR 8 2022 universal-background-checks YEA; called Trump border wall an 'immorality' (Jan 2019); AIPAC annual Policy Conference keynote speaker (Wikipedia headline photo); voted YEA on rule for HR 8034 Israel $17B supplemental (h142, Apr 2024); Heritage Action 119th score 0% (lifetime ~3%); NRA lifetime F; SBA Pro-Life 0%; EMILY's List flagship endorsee + Planned Parenthood + NARAL PAC recipient. Catholic-affiliated but rebuked by Archbishop Wuerl 2008 for incorrect statement on conception. ATTENDANCE CAVEAT: several Jan-Feb 2025 NOT-VOTING records (HR 21 Born-Alive h27, HR 28 Women & Girls in Sports h12, HR 29 Laken Riley h5) reflect Dec 2024 Luxembourg-fall hip surgery recovery, NOT principled abstention — those bills left null rather than scored. No heterodox-D catches found.

0.note: Aug 2008 Meet the Press: told Brokaw church teaching on conception is 'an issue of controversy'; rebuked by Archbishop Wuerl. Called Dobbs ruling 'cruel, outrageous, heart-wrenching' (2022).

1.note: Voted against Partial-Birth Abortion Ban Act 2003 and earlier versions. Lifetime 0% NRLC / SBA Pro-Life F.

2.note: Long-time sponsor/voter for federal embryonic stem-cell research expansion (HR 810 2006, HR 3 2007 110th Congress).

4.note: Flagship EMILY's List endorsee + Planned Parenthood Action Fund + NARAL Pro-Choice PAC recipient across 19+ cycles per OpenSecrets/FEC.

0.note: Voted AGAINST Defense of Marriage Act (1996) and Federal Marriage Amendment (2004, 2006).

1.note: Voted YEA on HR 8404 Respect for Marriage Act (h513, Dec 8 2022) — codified same-sex marriage federally.

2.note: Long-time Equality Act champion (HR 5 prior Congresses, HR 15 119th); opposed Trump trans military ban.

4.note: Equality Act floor champion (2019 speech) — affirmative promotion of LGBTQ+ status in federal civil rights law.

0.note: Lifetime record against federal school-choice/voucher expansions; NEA-aligned voting pattern.

1.note: Voted against HR 748 criminalizing transport of minors across state lines for abortion (skirting state parental-consent laws).

4.note: Equality Act provisions strip Title VII religious exemptions from adoption agencies declining same-sex placements.

1.note: Shepherded ACA contraceptive mandate (downstream Little Sisters of the Poor / Hobby Lobby conscience litigation).

2.note: Equality Act cosponsor — explicit override of RFRA conscience protections for religious medical/business/adoption.
Heritage Action 119th 0% / lifetime ~3%. Voted NAY h100 H.Con.Res. 14 budget resolution (Apr 10 2025); architect of ACA, ARRA, ARP, Build Back Better — all major deficit drivers.

4.note: Repeated Davos attendee as Speaker; consistent pro-ESG SEC-disclosure voting record.

1.note: Voted NAY on HR 22 SAVE Act final passage (h102, Apr 10 2025) — opposed documentary proof of citizenship for federal voter registration.

2.note: Architect of HR 1 For the People Act (117th) — mandated automatic registration, ballot drop boxes, expanded mail voting.

3.note: HR 1 expanded mail-in voting + drop boxes nationwide; CA-11 district practices ballot harvesting.

0.note: Called Trump border wall an 'immorality' (Jan 2019 floor remarks); led 2018-19 shutdown opposition to wall funding.

1.note: Long-time DREAM Act / DACA codification champion; voted against Laken Riley Act-type detention mandates historically.

2.note: Defended SF flagship sanctuary city policy publicly.

0.note: Lifetime NRA F rating; voted against national concealed-carry reciprocity.

1.note: Co-led 1994 federal Assault Weapons Ban; 2018-2022 pushed renewed AWB + HR 8 universal background checks (117th).

4.note: Voted YEA on FY23 NDAA + repeated ATF funding YEAs; supportive of expanded federal gun-enforcement budgets.

1.note: Supported Syria/Libya interventions; criticized Trump Syria withdrawal as 'Christmas gift to Putin.' Pro-AUMF maintenance pattern.

2.note: Voted YEA on rule for HR 8034 Israel $17B supplemental (h142, Apr 2024); NDAA Israel-aid YEAs consistent.

3.note: Annual AIPAC Policy Conference keynote speaker (Wikipedia headline photo); long-running pro-AIPAC PAC fundraising. Documented foreign-lobby alignment.

4.note: 2022 Ukraine visit endorsing NATO expansion; consistent pro-WHO funding votes; pro-supranational-governance pattern as Speaker.

0.note: Championed COVID vaccine mandates in 117th Congress; voted NAY on Jan 2023 HR 497 to end federal-employee COVID vax mandate.

4.note: Voted YEA FY23 NDAA + consistent NDAA YEA pattern; as Speaker did not advance Pentagon-audit reform. Pro-defense-contractor voting pattern.

set.office: U.S. Representative CA-11 (LOST 2026-06-02 D primary 3rd ~15% · withdrew 2026-06-03)

profile.religion: Bengali-American Hindu background (Wikipedia categorizes as 'American Hindus'); no documented religious-liberty public stance.
profile.background: Tech engineer (early Stripe employee). Co-founded Justice Democrats + Brand New Congress. Former Chief of Staff to Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez (2019); helped draft Green New Deal resolution. First-time candidate. LOST June 2 2026 CA-11 D primary (3rd, ~15%) behind Wiener (~41%) and Chan (~29%). Withdrew June 3 2026.

saikat-chakrabarti.notes_set: Ex-AOC chief of staff, Justice Democrats co-founder, GND architect. LOST 2026-06-02 CA-11 primary (3rd, ~15%); WITHDREW 2026-06-03. [2026-06 national-autopilot refinement, federal tier] HARD HETERODOX-D CATCHES (rare): (1) AIPAC-refusal HARD pledge with dedicated ActBlue URL 'saikat-rejects-aipac' + verbatim quote 'AIPAC wants to keep me out of the top two ... I am the only one who named the genocide in Gaza and called for a full arms embargo on Israel from the start' — foreign_policy_restraint q3 HARD TRUE; (2) Total Israel arms embargo position (went FURTHER than ceasefire/conditioning peers Wiener+Chan) — foreign_policy_restraint q2 HARD TRUE; (3) Hindu background — christian_liberty q0 HARD FALSE (cited, not inferred from party). Standard JD-progressive on life/marriage/gender (no direct quotes on most — left null per discipline); HARD FALSE on border (defund-ICE tweet, 'New Southern Democrats' rebuke of D border-enforcement crossovers); pro-GND deficit-spending FALSE on economic_stewardship q2. Tech-founder Stripe-equity wealth (~$50M) + self-funded $10M+ ad spend. MD residence controversy (declared MD home as principal residence on loan/tax forms while running for CA seat) — not rubric-scoring but flagged. Status fix is the high-value finding; CA-11 sweep now 4-of-6 withdrawn/lost (bettles + wheeler + helton + chakrabarti).

0.note: Wikipedia categorizes as 'American Hindus'; Bengali-American Hindu background. HARD cite, not party-inferred.

2.note: Co-architect of Green New Deal resolution; campaign platform centered on large public-investment 'global green transition.' Pro-deficit-spending stance.

0.note: Tweeted Democrats voting for border enforcement funding were 'the New Southern Democrats' enabling 'a racist system.' Direct opposition to border-barrier/military-border policy.

1.note: Campaign 'called for abolishing or defunding ICE' — direct opposition to mandatory deportation.

2.note: HETERODOX-D HARD: advocates 'a total arms embargo' on Israel — went further than ceasefire/conditioning peers. Direct opposition to foreign-aid pattern.

3.note: HETERODOX-D HARD: explicit AIPAC-refusal pledge with dedicated ActBlue URL 'saikat-rejects-aipac.' Verbatim: 'AIPAC wants to keep me out of the top two ... I am the only one who named the genocide in Gaza and called for a full arms embargo on Israel from the start.' Standout heterodox-D on foreign-lobby money.

4.note: GND architect prioritizes Pentagon-cut/Pentagon-audit reallocation to climate; Justice Democrats founding platform supports defense-contractor accountability. HETERODOX-D on Pentagon-waste pillar.

set.office: U.S. Representative CA-11 (LOST 2026-06-02 D primary 4th 4.5% · ex-R turned D 2022)

profile.religion: No documented religious affiliation; no church membership cited in bio.
profile.background: Attorney; founder ConnectedSF (2020). Trump-appointed Presidio Trust Board member (March 2018), elected Chair April 2021. Registered Republican until 2022; ran as Democrat. Led recall efforts vs. SF DA Boudin + school board + Sup. Engardio. No prior elected office. LOST June 2 2026 CA-11 D primary (4th among Ds / 5th overall, 4.5% / 5,510 votes).

marie-hurabiell.notes_set: Trump-appointed Presidio Trust ex-R running as 'common-sense moderate' D. LOST 2026-06-02 CA-11 primary (4th 4.5%). [2026-06 national-autopilot refinement, federal tier] HARD HETERODOX-EX-R CATCHES (rare from a D ballot): (1) HARD anti-trans-women-in-women's-categories X posts (6/15/2025: 'Trans women are NOT women, regardless of your personal beliefs. Science: DNA. Chromosomes. Body structure.' + Feb 2026 reiteration) — biblical_marriage q2 HARD TRUE; (2) HARD anti-CRT (2021 X post: '[Critical race theory] was a tactic used by Hitler and KKK') — family_child_sovereignty q2 HARD TRUE; (3) Led SF DA Boudin + school board recalls — family_child_sovereignty parental-rights aligned, SOFT TRUE; (4) PRO-ISRAEL HAWK soliciting Moses Libitzky / WINEP donor network (HARD FALSE on foreign_policy_restraint q3) + war-powers-permissive on June 2025 Iran strikes ('under Article 2 ... this is a legal action') — FALSE on foreign_policy_restraint q0; (5) HARD TRUE on Congressional stock-trading ban (economic-stewardship anti-revolving-door spirit); (6) HARD FALSE on economic_stewardship q3-style: explicit UBI advocate. Wiener campaign labeled her 'MAGA Republican pretending to be a Democrat.' Net heterodox-ex-R: pro-gender-realism + anti-CRT + pro-stock-trading-ban + pro-Israel-hawk (cuts against typical SF-D pattern). Status fix is the primary finding; CA-11 sweep continues winnow.

2.note: HETERODOX-EX-R HARD: 6/15/2025 X post 'Trans women are NOT women, regardless of your personal beliefs. Science: DNA. Chromosomes. Body structure.' Reiterated Feb 2026. Direct affirmation of biological sex / rejection of transgender ideology — rare from D ballot.
HETERODOX-EX-R HARD: 2021 X post '[Critical race theory] was a tactic used by Hitler and KKK.' Apologized for tone (2022) but did not retract substance. Direct CRT opposition.
Policy plank: 'Oppose unnecessary federal spending that creates inflation.' Pro-fiscal-restraint framing (though paired with UBI advocacy — see anti-stewardship cells).

1.note: Policy plank: DACA protection + 'naturalization eligibility after 10 years without crimes' + 'expand H-1B + startup visa + seasonal worker programs.' Direct opposition to mandatory deportation of DACA recipients and broad pathway expansion.

0.note: On June 2025 Iran strikes: 'under Article 2 of the War Powers, this is a legal action. The president can make strikes like this.' Accepts expansive Article II executive war power against Article I requirement.

2.note: Solicited / fielded donor call from Moses Libitzky (WINEP board president, AIPAC-aligned megadonor); publicly attacked Wiener for calling Gaza 'genocide.' Pro-Israel hawk, supports aid continuation.

3.note: Actively courting pro-Israel megadonor network (Libitzky/WINEP); no AIPAC-refusal pledge. Documented foreign-lobby-adjacent fundraising.

4.note: Policy plank: 'ban stock trading for members of Congress and family members.' Direct anti-revolving-door / Congressional-ethics reform — spirit of defense-contractor accountability pillar.

set.office: U.S. Representative CA-11 (LOST 2026-06-02 R primary 10th of 11 ~2.3% · ballot designation 'Social Management Scientist' · first-time candidate)

profile.religion: No documented religious affiliation; secular 'social management science' framing.
profile.background: Chinese immigrant (Taishan, naturalized Sep 2022); Lyft driver since 2018; founder of 'San Francisco Bay Area Home' (2022); prior DoorDash + Panda Restaurant kitchen helper. Limited English fluency (communicates in Cantonese / Chinese-language blog). Education: high school diploma, Taishan Overseas Chinese Middle School. Prior race: 2024 CA State Senate D-11 primary (lost to Wiener). LOST June 2 2026 CA-11 primary (10th of 11, 2.3% / 2,816 votes).

jingchao-xiong.notes_set: CRITICAL DATA FIX: previously recorded as D — Xiong is REPUBLICAN per his ballot designation 'Social Management Scientist' (one of only two Republicans on CA-11 ballot, alongside Ganezer). [2026-06 national-autopilot refinement, federal tier] LOST 2026-06-02 CA-11 primary 10th of 11 (~2.3% / 2,816 votes). Sparse first-time-candidate record: NO EVIDENCE FOUND on abortion/marriage/family/religious-liberty/2A/border/Israel/AIPAC across campaign site, BallotReady, GoodParty, and news coverage. Campaign platform is hyper-local SF + government-reform / social-management-science framework + pro-tech-industry-Bay-Area growth + interventionist values-export framing toward China ('change China so that China has the same values as the United States'). Robbery victim cited as motivation but does NOT translate to 2A advocacy (frames public safety as 'social management,' not armed defense). PARTY CORRECTION + STATUS FIX are the high-value findings; per skill discipline, roster_verified confidence (no fabrication) with all cells null is the honest outcome.

set.office: U.S. Representative CA-11 (LOST 2026-06-02 R primary 5th 5.2% · Santa Monica Observer publisher · self-described 'social moderate')

profile.religion: No documented religious-liberty stance; Jewish background reported (not cited-form HARD).
profile.background: B.A. History Stanford 1982 + M.A. Russian Studies Stanford 1983 + J.D. UCLA Law 1987. CA Bar #134337. U.S. Coast Guard Reserve 1980-1986 (Second Class Boatswain's Mate, Station Fort Point SF Presidio). Publisher of Santa Monica Observer since 1998 (~10K print circ.) — documented by LA Times / MBFC for fake-news including 2016 Hillary Clinton 'body double' and 2022 Paul Pelosi attack defamation. 2009 SM City Attorney false-advertising charge re circulation claims. LOST June 2 2026 CA-11 primary (5th overall, 5.2%); $60.33 total raised per FEC; no institutional endorsements (CRA did not endorse).

[2026-06 national-autopilot refinement, federal tier] HARD HETERODOX-R CATCHES: self-described verbatim on Ballotpedia Candidate Connection 2026 as 'a social moderate who supports gay marriage and abortion rights' — (1) HARD FALSE on sanctity_of_life q0 (pro-choice); (2) HARD FALSE on biblical_marriage q0+q1 (pro-SSM); (3) HARD TRUE on industry_capture q4 (explicit Congressional-stock-trading-ban plank). Foreign-policy / 2A / border / family / religious-liberty / election-integrity entirely UNADDRESSED on platform (hyperlocal SF campaign) → null across. CHARACTER FLAG (not rubric-scoring): Santa Monica Observer publishing history documented as 'questionable source' trafficking fake stories (LA Times, MBFC) + 2009 SM City Attorney false-advertising case. Status fix is the primary finding; CA-11 sweep continues winnow (now 5+ withdrawn/lost across multi-batch CA-11 series).

0.note: HETERODOX-R HARD: self-stated verbatim on Ballotpedia Candidate Connection 2026: 'I am a social moderate who supports gay marriage and abortion rights.' Direct rejection of personhood-at-conception position.
